def negative_typed_dict_total_false_without_docstring_noting_optional_keys():
    rule_id = "typed_dict_total_false_without_docstring_noting_optional_keys"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "TypedDict(total=False) class has no docstring indicating which keys are optional."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
